findings.desc: unused imports Any,Sequence in typing block (grid.py:33,39)
upload validation diverges: validates expanded(label) layout so dep checks fire on upload; oracle validated trimmed layout (deps no-op) (grid.py:416-426)
tag protein_id resolved scan-only (last-wins); multi-proteoform-per-scan shows 0 tags for other proteoform vs oracle showing all scan tags (schema.py:383,390-397)
_explode_list_cols lacks null-row guard -> phantom null row for empty/zero-mass cells (schema.py:54-73)
tag_resolution mapping unused; only build_proteoform_scan_map used (spec-vs-oracle nuance) (schema.py:374-398)
Mass->3D drift: mass_table sets mass=mass_id(global) but 3D reads mass=mass_in_scan(per-scan ordinal); coincide only scan 0 (render.py:124,153)
Spectrum->3D wrong identity: deconv/anno spectrum set mass=peak_id(global) overloading the mass_in_scan slot (render.py:131,138,145)
initial-render divergence: auto-selects first experiment vs oracle blank-until-pick (FLASHDeconvViewer.py:54)
SequenceView peaks frame uses MonoMass; component hard-requires column 'mass' -> observedMasses=[] (also deconv) (render.py:62-69; schema.py:212-222)
scan->protein peak remap missing: filters protein_id on deconv_spectrum_tidy which lacks it -> peaks unfiltered (render.py:62-75; schema.py:403-447)
tagger overlay dead: tag_table emits scalar tag_id but tagger needs opaque TagData dict (render.py:199-203,141-149)
combined_spectrum blank: nothing sets scan/spectrum in TnT layout; protein/tag set protein/tag (render.py:141-149; FLASHTnTViewer.py:13-18)
